posts.author: Crice (Casey Rice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The search everything feature be able to search keywords within attached documents that are added to boards.

What are you trying to achieve

When attaching documents, like resumes, to a board, it would be helpful to be able to put in a keyword and it could pull up that document.
